name: Shenyang Jinshan Energy Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenyang Jinshan Energy Co., Ltd. produces and sells electricity and heat in the Liaoning and Inner Mongolia regions of China. The company was formerly known as Shenyang Jinshan Thermoelectric Co., Ltd. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Shenyang, China. Shenyang Jinshan Energy Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Huadian Jinshan Energy Co., Ltd.
